What We Offer

Our
Services

Every frame crafted with intention. Every moment preserved with artistry.

Weddings

Wedding Photography

From $1,500

Capture your special day with stunning, timeless imagery that tells your unique love story. Comprehensive coverage from preparation through to the final dance.

  • 8+ hours of coverage
  • 500+ professionally edited photos
  • Online gallery & digital download
  • Print release included
  • Engagement session
  • Second photographer option
Book This Service
Portraits

Portrait Sessions

From $300

Professional portraits for individuals, families, and corporate headshots. Compelling images that reveal personality, confidence, and authentic character.

  • 1–2 hour session
  • 50+ edited photos
  • Multiple outfit changes
  • Studio or location of choice
  • Professional retouching
  • Same-day preview available
Book This Service
Film

Commercial Video

From $800

High-quality video production for brands, promotional campaigns, and commercial content. From concept development to final colour-graded delivery.

  • 4K video quality
  • Professional colour grading & editing
  • Multiple format delivery
  • Script & storyboard consultation
  • 48-hour rush delivery option
  • Drone footage available
Book This Service
Events

Event Coverage

From $600

Comprehensive photo and video coverage for corporate events, conferences, and special occasions. Every meaningful moment documented with precision.

  • Full event documentation
  • Same-day highlight reel
  • Multi-photographer coverage
  • Live streaming options
  • Social-media-ready content
  • Custom branded delivery
Book This Service
